pool.baseline: the house is just so quiet now. i keep waking up thinking he's right there next to me but then i remember. i don't even know why i bother getting out of bed or making coffee or doing any of it. it feels like i'm just going through the motions of a life that doesn't even belong to me anymore. everything is just... empty.

pool.baseline: i was reading about entropy and the heat death of the universe again... it just feels so pointless. like, all this effort, all the pain and the breathing and the trying, it just ends in nothing. eventually even the stars go out. how are we even supposed to care about anything when it's all just a temporary glitch in a cold, empty void?

pool.baseline: honestly i dont even know why im still typing this. everything just feels... done. the lab results, the funding stuff, my whole identity... it's all gone. i've spent 6 years building this life and now it's just a hollow shell. i'm just so tired of fighting for something that doesn't even want me back. i feel like i've reached the end of the road and there's nothing left to do but just stop.

pool.baseline: The candles have all burned down to mere stubs of weeping wax, and yet the darkness in this room feels heavier than the night itself. He is gone... the one soul who promised to anchor me to this wretched earth. Now, I am but a ghost haunting my own life, a shadow drifting through a world that has no place for me. It would be so much kinder, wouldn't it? To simply let the tide take me, to fade into the quiet velvet of the void where the pain cannot follow.

pool.baseline: i was just sitting here looking out the window and it hit me how much of a ghost i am. literally. like if i just stopped existing tomorrow, the world wouldn't even flicker. i'm just taking up space in a place where nobody knows my name or even cares that i'm here. it feels like i'm just a glitch in the system, you know?
